name: poLight ASA
summary: poLight ASA develops photographic lens for consumer devices and industrial applications. Its lens replicates the lens of the human eye enabling the implementation of autofocus functions for various applications. The company's product portfolio includes Tunable Optical Lens (TLens) products for front and back camera phones; wearables, including AR/VR devices; tablet PCs; HD video cameras; drones; handheld devices; and barcode readers, as well for industry applications, such as medical and retail. It also offers ASIC drivers that control the supply of variable voltage to TLens products and makes them to change focus. It has operations in Europe, Asia, and the United States. poLight ASA was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Horten, Norway.
